title: Broken streetlight
description: The light at Main & 5th has been out for a week.

title: Suspicious activity
description: People loitering behind the warehouse at night.

title: Dangerous pothole
description: Large pothole on Oak Avenue causing flat tires.
location: Oak Avenue, near the park entrance

title: Rat infestation in park
description: Multiple rat sightings near children's playground.

title: Smoke from building
description: Light smoke seen on the roof of the old factory.

title: Illegal dumping
description: Someone dumped tyres and paint cans by the river.

title: Fallen tree blocking road
description: A large tree has fallen across Cedar Road after last night's storm, blocking both lanes.

title: Graffiti on public library
description: Spray paint vandalism covering the east-facing wall of the public library entrance.

title: Armed robbery at convenience store
description: Witness reports an armed individual robbed the corner store and fled on foot heading north.

title: Vandalized bus shelter
description: Bus shelter on Maple Street has shattered glass panels and a broken bench.

title: Water main burst
description: Water is gushing from a burst main on Hill Street, flooding the road and nearby properties.

title: Overflowing rubbish bins
description: Public bins along the waterfront promenade have been overflowing for three days, attracting pests.

title: Speeding vehicles near school
description: Drivers are consistently ignoring the school zone speed limit on Brook Lane during drop-off hours.
location: Brook Lane, in front of Greenview Primary School

title: Gas leak smell reported
description: Residents on Pine Close are reporting a strong gas smell coming from the underground utility corridor.

title: Dead animals near river
description: Multiple dead fish and two birds found on the riverbank, possibly indicating water contamination.

title: Broken traffic signal
description: Traffic light at the intersection of King Road and Queen Street is stuck on red in all directions.

title: Sewage overflow on footpath
description: A cracked sewage pipe is leaking waste onto the pedestrian footpath on Station Road.
location: Station Road, outside the train station

title: Chemical smell near factory
description: Strong chemical odour reported by residents living near the East Side industrial complex.
location: East Side Industrial Complex, Factory Row

title: Collapsed pavement
description: A section of pavement on West End Road has caved in, posing a fall risk for pedestrians.
location: West End Road, near the post office

title: Unlicensed street vendor
description: Vendor operating without a permit near the town square, blocking pedestrian access.

title: Electrical wires hanging low
description: Storm damage has left exposed electrical wires dangling at head height on Rosewood Avenue.

title: Abandoned vehicle blocking alley
description: A vehicle with no plates has been abandoned in the service alley behind Market Street for five days.

title: Noise complaint — construction at night
description: Construction crew working past midnight, violating city noise ordinance.

title: Playground equipment damaged
description: Swing set chains are broken and a slide has a sharp exposed edge, unsafe for children.

title: Stray dog pack near school
description: Pack of around six stray dogs spotted roaming near the school gates during morning hours.

title: Oil spill on road surface
description: Large oil slick on the highway on-ramp is making the road dangerously slippery.

title: Building fire — residential block
description: Flames visible from the third floor of an apartment block. Residents are evacuating.
location: Sunset Apartments, Block B, Lakeview Drive

title: Drain blockage causing flooding
description: Blocked storm drain is causing standing water to accumulate on Lower Bridge Street after rain.
location: Lower Bridge Street, near Drainage Point 9

title: Food poisoning outbreak — restaurant
description: Seven individuals hospitalised after dining at the same restaurant on Friday evening. Possible contamination.
location: The Golden Fork Restaurant, High Street

title: Illegal dumping — construction waste
description: Rubble and construction materials dumped overnight in the nature reserve car park.
location: Green Valley Nature Reserve, Car Park A
